description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, low-profile design, set within a rectangular plot bordered by a combination of stone and brick walls. The structure features a prominent, multi-faceted hip roof with gray shingles and a central chimney, complemented by a large covered front porch supported by sturdy columns. The front facade includes a wide driveway leading to a double garage, and a set of steps ascending to the main entrance. The surrounding landscape is composed of neatly manicured lawns and sloped terrain, with the rear of the property offering a spacious backyard area. Windows are arranged in a linear fashion along the sides and rear, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is robust and inviting, with a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, large front porch, double garage, and manicured lawns, enclosed by stone and brick walls. The design features a mix of traditional and modern elements with linear window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide steps, large covered porch, double garage, and driveway.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the sloped terrain, side windows, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious backyard, linear window arrangement, and the full expanse of the hip roof.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizing the roof's structure, side lawn, and the transition between the driveway and backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with linear side and rear windows
